languages.text: "Сканирую... Запрос отклонен. Неизвестные технологии не являются частью дара Омниссии, не подлежат восстановлению и должны быть немедленно утилизированы".

traits.locale_text: "Фиксирую запрос... Запрос отклонен. Ксеносские технологии не подлежат ремонту и должны быть немедленно утилизированы".

languages.text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."
languages.original_text: "Сканирую... Запрос отклонен. Неизвестные технологии не являются частью дара Омниссии, не подлежат восстановлению и должны быть немедленно утилизированы".

traits.locale_text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."
"Registering request... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."
"Registering request... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."
"Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

languages.text: 「登録要求中...要求拒否。未知の技術はオムニシアスの贈り物ではなく、修復対象ではなく、即座に廃棄されるべきである」
languages.original_text: "Registering request... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「登録要求中...要求拒否。未知の技術はオムニシアスの贈り物ではなく、修復対象ではなく、即座に廃棄されるべきである。」

languages.text: "Taranıyor... Talep reddedildi. Bilinmeyen teknolojiler; Hermesih'in armağanları arasında değildir, restorasyona tabi değildir ve derhâl imha edilmelidir."
languages.original_text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Taranıyor... Talep reddedildi. Bilinmeyen teknolojiler; Hermesih'in armağanları arasında değildir, restorasyona tabi değildir ve derhâl imha edilmelidir."

languages.text: «Escaneando... Solicitud denegada. La tecnología desconocida no se cuenta entre los dones del Omnissiah, no está sujeta a restauración y debe eliminarse de inmediato».
languages.original_text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

traits.locale_text: «Escaneando... Solicitud denegada. La tecnología desconocida no se cuenta entre los dones del Omnissiah, no está sujeta a restauración y debe eliminarse de inmediato».

languages.text: “正在进行扫描……请求已驳回。未知技术并非欧姆尼赛亚之恩赐，不可修复，必须立即销毁。”
languages.original_text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

traits.locale_text: “正在进行扫描……请求已驳回。未知技术并非欧姆尼赛亚之恩赐，不可修复，必须立即销毁。”

languages.text: « Analyse en cours... Demande refusée. Les technologies inconnues ne faisant pas partie des dons de l'Omnimessie, il n'est pas permis de les rétablir. Elles doivent être détruites sur-le-champ. »
languages.original_text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

traits.locale_text: « Analyse en cours... Demande refusée. Les technologies inconnues ne faisant pas partie des dons de l'Omnimessie, il n'est pas permis de les rétablir. Elles doivent être détruites sur-le-champ. »

languages.text: "Scanne ... Anfrage abgewiesen. "Unbekannte Technologien sind nicht Teil der Gaben des Omnissiah und dürfen nicht restauriert, sondern müssen sofort entsorgt werden."
languages.original_text: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Scanne ... Anfrage abgewiesen. "Unbekannte Technologien sind nicht Teil der Gaben des Omnissiah und dürfen nicht restauriert, sondern müssen sofort entsorgt werden."
